{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/227850795?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/amwhoi", "id": 227850795, "login": "amwhoi", "node_id": "U_kgDODZS6Kw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45058", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-494", "name": "Download of Code Without Integrity Check"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-915", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes"}], "description": "### Impact
_Persistent local-pty code execution via imported bookmarks or compromised sync targets. Affects users who import bookmark JSON files or who have electerm sync configured (gist/WebDAV). The attacker can inject `exec*` fields or global config to cause remote code to run when a bookmark is opened or when sync is applied._

### Patches

Not yet

### Workarounds
- Do not import unsafe data

### References
- Report / credit: https://github.com/Curly-Haired-Baboon

title: Electerm: Importing unsafe bookmark data could lead to unsafe operation when clicking local type bookmark
